titleStmt.title: SII 16.87: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 87. (A.R. No. 14 of 1915.) ŚRĪŚAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the floor of the northern porch into the mukha-maṇḍapa of the central shrine of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Chaitra ba. 30, Monday, corresponding to 1530 A.D. March 28, f.d.t. °23. There was a solar eclipse on the following day, not cited in the inscription.

It records that Avasaram Chandraśēkharayya had a maṇḍapa built in front of the sleeping chamber of god Mallikārjuna, presented golden images of Nandīśvara and Bhṛiṅgīśvara, set up standing stone figures of his master Kṛishṇarāya, his own fatherin-law Dēmarsa and of himself in that maṇḍapa, and granted the village of Śivapuram in his nāyaṅkara Mosalimaḍugu-sīma for worship and offerings to the deity in that maṇḍapa. He also presented a golden kāhaḷa and a silver pānavaṭṭam to the god and consecrated Dēmayaliṅga to the north of Mallikārjuna, set up a golden pillar in front of it, and having built a bath near the Vīrabhadra temple at Nāgalūṭi at the foot of the hill, consecrated another Dēmayaliṅga there and granted the agrahāra Dēmasamudra to Brāhmaṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . svasti
śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1452
Agunēṁṭi vikṛti saṁvatsara caitra ba 30 so śrīmadrājādhirāja
paramēśvara śrī kṛṣṇadēvarāyalu pṛthvīrājyaṁ sēyucunu tama
Avasaraṁ caṁdraśēkharayyaku śrīśailarājyaṁ pāliṁstēnu rāyalaku
nnu tama māma dēmarsayyakunnu tamakunnu puṇyaṁgānu śrīgiri mī
ṁdaṁ jēsina dharmānaku śāsanaṁ mallikārjunadēvara pavvaḷiṁcē pajjagṛ
haṁ muṁdara śilāmaṁḍapaṁ gaṭṭiṁci Ā cūrunnu gaṁṭaveṭṭi
nni naṁdīśvara bhṛṁgīśvarulānu baṁgāraṁ sēyiṁci Ā maṁṭapaṁ lōnu tama
svāmi kṛṣṇarāyalunnu tama māma dēmarsayyānu tānuṁnu śilākārā
na nilici koluvaṁjēsi [Aṁdara] Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālu sāgiṁci śrīgiripatiki Amṛ
tapaḷḷaku tama nāyaṁkarānakuṁ jellē mosalimaḍugu śīmalōni śivapuraṁ A
nē grāmamu Icci baṁgāru kāhaḷinni veṁḍi pānavaṭṭamunnu samarpiṁcci dē
vuniki vuttarāna dēmayaliṁgamununnu baṁgārukaṁbhamunnu nilipi diguva nā
gulūṭi vīraṇaku mīdānu kēḷākūḷinni kaṭiṁci Akkaḍa dēmayaliṁgamunu
pratiṣṭhasēsi brāhmalaku dēmasamudraṁ Anē Agrahāramunnu Icci kṛṣṇarāyalu
nu dēmarsayyānu tāmunnu sōmasūtramaṁdu dēvuni vāḍukune pra
sāda jāmali niluvaṁ jēyiṁci caṁdraśēkharayya śrīśailarājyaṁ yēlu
cuṁḍenu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
